name: Better Performance and Lower Prices Through TPC Benchmarks
description: Aberdeen Technology Viewpoint examining TPC benchmarks (TPC-A, TPC-B, TPC-C) as the de facto standard for measuring commercial performance and price-performance. Covers the history of Debit/Credit benchmarking, TPC formation in 1988, and detailed vendor comparisons across DEC VAX, HP, IBM AS/400, Sequent, Bull, Sun, and others. Concludes that TPC-A competition has driven a five-fold improvement in price-performance over two years and advocates that buyers mandate TPC-A results in RFPs.
